title: Packaging Corporation of America: Valuation Is Justified By Its Quality
text: Packaging Corporation of America specializes in the production of containerboard and corrugated packaging. The sector is stable and expects growth in the coming years, primarily driven by the expanding e-commerce market. The company has better ROIC, margins and financial position than its peers, but trades at average multiples.
